Sentiment is +0.11 and the stock is near 30D lows (~$149 vs high of $161), offering a favorable entry. The AI edge computing/on-device AI theme is a secular tailwind and this partnership validates QCOM's positioning. Targeting 5% weight given the speculative nature of the news.

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.10%, Nasdaq +0.15%, Dow -0.20%. Financials led sectors (+0.58%) while Real Estate lagged (-1.40%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +3.00%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +17.69%. Key headline: Freezing dormant BTC would trigger worst single day repricing in bitcoin’s history, says maximalist - CoinDesk — market reaction muted.
